title: Radial Seasonality Clock — polar projection
blurb: A polar seasonality clock that SWEEPS — average per-tick return by cyclic phase bin, drawn as filled radial wedges (a polar rose). A clock hand sweeps 0→360° over the timeline, revealing each wedge as it passes. The engine has no native polar transform; (angle, radius) is projected to cartesian (x=r·sinθ, y=r·cosθ) at build time and the wedges are filled triangles drawn by the triGradient@1 pipeline.

legend.label: Filled wedge = avg return by phase (24 bins)
Angle θ = session phase (bin 0 = 12 o'clock, clockwise)
